calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jul-02-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Administrator. JoAllen Picetti in Propria Persona.

Mr. Melbostad stated that after doing some research he now understand the issue of a third party trust versus a first party trust, and that Patricia can take direct distribution and that as long as she spends it within 30-days she will not lose her Social Security and Medi Cal benefits. Mr. Melbostad also stated that this will not change distribution to JoAllen, addressed extraordinary fees, stated that the purchase of the Rio Vista property will be in Patricia's name, that her Son is going to help her with the payment, that JoAllen got notice and that the original bank statement was filed. In addition, Mr. Melbostad stated that there was no estate of John, that the only asset was a quarter percent of Mary's estate and that it's all in a blocked account at Bank of The West. The Court fully explained the matter to Ms. Picetti. Ms. Picetti stated that she had no questions for the Court. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Stewart. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-18-2014 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-28-2014 Continued To Jun-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Of An Inventory And Appraisal And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-30-2014 Continued To May-28-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul Melbostad for Patricia Picetti.

The Court noted that the inventory was filed. Mr. Melbostad stated that they are working on the petition for final distribution, that it requires a little more work because they are preparing a Special Needs Trust for Patricia and that he will have it filed within two weeks. Status on filing of the petition for final distribution was continued to May 28, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)
